creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->feedback

fwiw, I have had to make some further changes because INDEX fails: 

make_index: lucene-2.9.4: no entry for /usr/ports 
make_index: colorer-0.b2_1: no entry for /usr/ports 
make_index: galax-0.3.5_3: no entry for /usr/ports 
make_index: jboss-3.2.8.SP1: no entry for /usr/ports 
make_index: jce_policy-1.4.2_3: no entry for /usr/ports 

For textproc/lucene, I patched the Makefile to say 1.5+. 

For the others, I simply removed them from the category Makefiles 
since they are expiring anyway: 

devel/colorer 
textproc/galax 
java/jboss3 
security/jce_policy14 

mcl
